name: validate-tuple-return
description: Refactor Mojo validation/evaluation functions that returned a single scalar to return Tuple[Float64, Float64] containing (loss, accuracy), eliminating a redundant second pass over the data loader. Use when: (1) a validate() function both computes metrics internally and the caller re-computes them in a second loop, (2) the forward pass runs more than twice per batch during evaluation with compute_accuracy=True, (3) accuracy is discarded inside validate() then recomputed by the caller.
